inputs.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue of the company. Used to normalize compliance risk relative to company size. Based on financial reporting standards (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Total Annual CO2 Emissions (metric tons)
inputs.businessContext: Total scope 1, 2, and 3 greenhouse gas emissions. Based on GHG Protocol and ISO 14064 standards.

inputs.label: Emission Reduction Target (%)
inputs.businessContext: Company's voluntary or regulatory target for reducing emissions by a certain percentage by a target year. Based on SBTi (Science Based Targets initiative) guidelines.

inputs.label: Target Year for Reduction
inputs.businessContext: Year by which the emission reduction target is to be achieved. Aligned with Paris Agreement timelines.

inputs.label: Current Year
inputs.businessContext: Base year for calculations. Used to determine remaining time to target.

inputs.label: Carbon Price (USD per metric ton)
inputs.businessContext: Market or regulatory carbon price (e.g., EU ETS, carbon tax). Based on World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard.

inputs.label: Regulatory Region
inputs.businessContext: Geographic region determining applicable carbon regulations. EU: EU ETS, US: EPA regulations, China: national ETS. Based on IEA and national climate policies.

inputs.label: Industry Sector
inputs.businessContext: Sector classification affecting emission intensity benchmarks and regulatory stringency. Based on IPCC sector categories.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in emission data accuracy. Low: estimated, Medium: partially measured, High: fully audited. Based on ISO 14064 data quality requirements.

hiddenLossDrivers: if complianceRiskScore > 0.8 then 'High compliance risk: immediate action required'
if emissionIntensity > 0.5 then 'Emission intensity above industry benchmark'
if requiredAnnualReductionRate > 10 then 'Reduction target may be unrealistic'
suggestedActions: Invest in energy efficiency measures to reduce emission intensity
Consider carbon offset purchases to bridge gap to target
Engage with regulatory bodies to understand future carbon price trends

premiumFeatures: Detailed compliance report with regulatory recommendations
